responses:
theorem P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    P2 A → P3 A := by
  intro h
  unfold P2 P3 at h ⊢
  have h1 : closure (interior A) ⊆ closure A := closure_mono interior_subset
  have h2 : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) := interior_mono h1
  exact subset_trans h h2

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  unfold Topology.P2 Topology.P1
  intro hP2 x hxA
  have hx : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := hP2 hxA
  have hcl : x ∈ closure (interior A) :=
    (interior_subset : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A)) hx
  exact hcl
